title: Phase 6A: Yard module - prep/loading queues, damage log, cycle count, length tally
description: Build yard module secondary UI components: order prep queue, loading queue, damage log with photo capture and notes, cycle count tool, and length tally tool for random length materials.
steps: Create src/components/yard/prep-queue.tsx with order prep queue (mobile-first)
Create src/components/yard/loading-queue.tsx with loading queue by truck/route
Create src/components/yard/damage-log.tsx with damage logging (photo capture + notes + severity)
Create src/components/yard/cycle-count.tsx with cycle count tool (scan/enter, expected vs actual, variance)
Create src/components/yard/length-tally.tsx with length tally tool for random-length materials (board-by-board entry, total calculation)
